selectedStrategy.name: High-Value Clusters First
selectedStrategy.rationale: Maximizes near-term value delivery by executing highest-ranked clusters first. Provides natural stopping points if resources exhausted. Aligns with iterative refinement model.

synthesis.notes: Hash binds this selection to a specific SYNTHESIS.json. Reproducibility check: given same synthesis hash, same strategy choice → same next spec-kit.

approval.decidedBy: automated selection (cluster-first is default; can be overridden by human review)
approval.notes: No human review required for default strategy. If alternative desired, update selectedStrategy.id and re-run L03 specgen.

traceability.notes: All refs point to artifacts produced by L03 specgen; together they form a complete execution record.
